g.text: Frontier 2026 runs land between 1 e26 and 1 e27 FLOPs. Late-2027 projection: $1–3 B per run.
— power and grid interconnect, not chips, are the binding constraint for the late-2027 cohort.
FIG. 03 · TRAINING COST PER FRONTIER RUN · USD MILLIONS · LOG SCALE
a single training run for a 2026 frontier model now exceeds the lifetime engineering budget of most enterprise software products.
Capital is no longer the gating factor; grid interconnect and multi-gigawatt power siting are. The next cohort is being built around substations, not around chips.
SOURCE EPOCH AI · DELUAIR CONSULTANCY 2026 · LOG-SCALE PLOT · COMPUTE-ONLY COST · POWER & SITE EXCLUDED
